message:
feat(ipc): add configurable IPC socket settings

Introduce IpcConfig struct for configurable IPC socket behavior:
- enabled: toggle IPC server on/off
- socket_path: absolute or workspace-relative path (default: ipc.sock)
- permissions: octal file permissions (default: 0o600)

Integration changes:
- Config: add ipc field, forbidden runtime changes for all 3 fields,
  tilde expansion for socket_path, validation when enabled
- WorkspaceLayout::new() accepts &IpcConfig, resolves socket path
  via resolve_ipc_socket_path() (absolute passthrough or wa_dir join)
- IpcServer::bind_with_permissions() applies configurable permissions
  after socket binding (bind() defaults to 0o600 for compatibility)
- collect_permission_warnings() checks socket with configured perms
- diagnostic.rs test updates: pass &config.ipc to WorkspaceLayout::new
- main.rs: pass &config.ipc to collect_permission_warnings()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
